page_metadata.biotools__summary: PCAj (Principal component analysis for Japanese)predicts population structure of Japanese samples using genome-wide SNP genotypes.  It creates a 2D scatterplot of predicted principal components based on the probabilistic PCA.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PCAj (Principal component analysis for Japanese)predicts population structure of Japanese samples using genome-wide SNP genotypes.  It creates a 2D scatterplot of predicted principal components based on the probabilistic PCA.
